text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin rises above her<n>powerful classic
and senior<n>competitors and triumphs at the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her rivals, the audience, and I—we all<n>cheer for her
as one.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite her small stature, she leaves<n>the biggest
mark of anyone at the<n>race.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With an undeniably beaming smile,<n>Narita Taishin
stands atop the<n>winner's circle.
